name: zsnd_cd_play_track_with_mode
description: zSndCd::PlayTrackWithMode seeks to a CD track, then applies the requested playback mode only after the seek succeeds.
known_limits: No accepted VC COFF byte comparison is recorded yet; binary-safe remains false.
The smoke patches mciSendCommandA so the composed MCI seek/play command sequence can be verified without a physical CD device.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation at 0x4a25e0 validates a zero default result, calling zSndCd::PlayTrack(trackIndex), calling zSndCd::ApplyPlaybackMode(playbackMode) only when the seek succeeds, and returning the applied-mode result.

The native smoke verifies the not-ready failure path and a patched-MCI success path that emits one MCI_SEEK followed by one MCI_PLAY, preserves the requested track and mode through the composed calls, and records the final track/playback state.
